docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00 - SERVED MAY-24-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, KHAIRY
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS, MATTHEW K

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANTS LUIS ZUNIGA; KHAIRY PARKER; ERNEST PARKER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00 - SERVED MAY-24-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, LUIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS, MATTHEW K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMOTO, KEITH ZUNIGA, LUIS PARKER, KHAIRY PARKER, ERNEST $1,974.21 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,124.21, DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY/SEVERALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR $1,062.43 OF THE JUDGMENT. ADDITIONALLY, LUIS ZUNIGA IS SEPARTELY RESPONSIBLE FOR $161.78 OF THE JUDGMENT AND ERNEST PARKER IS SEPARATELY RESPONSIBLE FOR $750 OF THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,977.00 FILED BY DOUGLAS, MATTHEW K AS TO DEFENDANT KIMOTO, KEITH ZUNIGA, LUIS PARKER, KHAIRY PARKER, ERNEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
